overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character exploring a cozy medieval cottage interior with stone walls, wooden beams, and a lit fireplace. The character walks continuously around the single-room dwelling, examining the furniture and architectural details.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy cottage main room with lit fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking slowly around the cottage main room, examining the stone fireplace and wooden furniture

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and hanging iron cauldron
tall wooden bookshelf filled with books and scrolls
wooden bowl filled with red apples on a table
upholstered wicker armchair with wooden frame
neatly stacked firewood beside the fireplace

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a medieval cottage main room, focused on a stone fireplace with a burning fire and hanging cauldron. The camera follows the hooded character as they walk along the right side of the room, passing a wooden bookshelf and a table with a bowl of apples. Warm firelight mixes with daylight filtering through unseen windows.

events.description: moving from the main fireplace area toward the back bedroom corner with two beds

agents.ego_description: proceeding toward the sleeping area at the back of the cottage, passing the fireplace

entered.detail: metal-frame bed with mattress and pillow in the foreground
second metal-frame bed against the back wall
heavy red fabric curtains covering a window or doorway
heavy wooden plank door with iron hinges at the front of the cottage
wooden balcony railing of an upper loft level

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the fireplace toward the back corner where two metal-frame beds are positioned against the wall. Red curtains hang on the left wall. As the character turns, the front wooden door and an upper loft balcony come into view, revealing the two-story height of the cottage.

events.description: turning to face the front entrance and upper loft area with chandelier
character slows and looks around the entrance area before turning back

agents.ego_description: examining the front door and loft area, then turning back toward the room center

entered.detail: iron chandelier hanging from the thatched ceiling
lit candle sconces mounted on the stone wall
large open book resting on a wooden lectern
closed wooden storage chest on the floor

segments.scene_description: Facing the front entrance, the character observes the wooden door, overhead chandelier, and upper loft level. An open book sits on a lectern to the right. The character pauses to look around the entrance area, then begins turning back toward the center of the room, passing the wicker chair and wooden table once more.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cozy medieval cottage, transitioning from the warmth of a hearth to the architectural openness of the main entrance. It begins focused on a stone fireplace with a burning fire and hanging cauldron, following a hooded character as they pass a wooden bookshelf and a table with a bowl of apples. As the character moves deeper into the room, the view shifts toward the back corner where metal-frame beds sit against the wall beside red curtains. The scene then expands to reveal the full height of the dwelling, opening up to show a wooden front door, an overhead chandelier, and an upper loft balcony. Finally, the camera lingers on an open book atop a lectern before turning back toward the center of the room, passing a wicker chair and wooden table.
